name: JabbokRiverProductions
tagline_ro: Religia LUI Isus, nu religia DESPRE Isus
tagline_en: The religion OF Jesus, not the religion ABOUT Jesus

thesis.ro: Adventismul Zilei a Șaptea contemporan se confruntă cu o întrebare străveche: cultivăm religia LUI Isus (credință experiențială, ascultare a voii Tatălui) sau religia DESPRE Isus (sistem doctrinar despre persoana Lui)?
thesis.en: Contemporary Seventh-day Adventism faces an ancient question: do we cultivate the religion OF Jesus (experiential faith, doing the Father's will) or the religion ABOUT Jesus (a doctrinal system concerning his person)?

host.name: Dr. Emanoil Geaboc
host.bio_ro: Teolog de origine română, predicator în comunitatea Adventistă de Ziua a Șaptea.
host.bio_en: Romanian-born theologian and preacher within the Seventh-day Adventist community.

covenant.paper_ref: The Urantia Book — Paper 196: The Faith of Jesus
covenant.alignment_quote: The religion of Jesus is the most dynamic influence ever to activate the human race.

footer: JabbokRiver Productions · Religia LUI Isus, nu religia DESPRE Isus / The religion OF Jesus, not the religion ABOUT Jesus · Part of Mircea's Constellation · Inspired by The Urantia Book, Paper 196.
